title: Performance Optimization: Virtualization, Caching, and Profiling Your OpenMaui App
subtitle: Master performance optimization techniques to achieve sub-20ms frame times and smooth 60 FPS animations in your Linux desktop applications.
pullQuotes: The difference between a good app and a great app often comes down to those imperceptible milliseconds—keeping frame times under 16.67ms ensures your users experience buttery-smooth 60 FPS animations.
View virtualization isn't just an optimization; it's a fundamental requirement for any collection displaying more than a few dozen items.
Memory leaks in event handlers and cached resources are the silent killers of long-running desktop applications—proper disposal patterns aren't optional, they're essential.

sections.header: View Virtualization for CollectionView and CarouselView
